summary: Iteration 13 testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend UI features verified working. New features tested: Streak endpoint, auto-category creation for debts/savings, biweekly budget fields, category filter in Transactions, stacked chart colors.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/streak correctly returns streak, max_streak, total_days - counts consecutive days from today backwards
POST /api/debts auto-creates expense category with debt name if not exists
POST /api/savings auto-creates expense category with savings goal name if not exists
POST /api/budgets accepts biweekly fields: period_type, q1_projected, q1_done, q2_projected, q2_done
GET /api/budgets/comparison returns biweekly fields for each category
Streak badge with Flame icon displays in header when streak > 0
Budget Mensual/Quincenal toggle works correctly in Dashboard
Biweekly table renders with Q1/Q2 columns (Proy. Q1, OK, Real Q1, Proy. Q2, OK, Real Q2, Estado)
Category filter dropdown in Transactions page filters by unique categories from current month
Reports stacked chart uses distinct colors: green (#22c55e) for Ingresos, red (#ef4444) for Gastos, blue (#3b82f6) for Ahorro, yellow (#f59e0b) for Deudas
seed_data_creation: Test users, sessions, transactions, and categories created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested all new features from the batch improvement. Backend endpoints verified: GET /api/streak (returns streak, max_streak, total_days), POST /api/debts (auto-creates expense category), POST /api/savings (auto-creates expense category), POST /api/budgets (accepts biweekly fields), GET /api/budgets/comparison (returns biweekly fields). Frontend verified: Streak badge with Flame icon in header, Budget Mensual/Quincenal toggle in Dashboard, Biweekly table with Q1/Q2 columns, Category filter dropdown in Transactions page, Stacked chart with distinct colors (green/red/blue/yellow) in Reports page.

backend_streak.details: Returns streak (consecutive days from today), max_streak (longest streak ever), total_days (unique days with transactions)

backend_debt_auto_category.details: Auto-creates expense category with debt name if not exists

backend_savings_auto_category.details: Auto-creates expense category with savings goal name if not exists

backend_budget_biweekly.details: Accepts period_type, q1_projected, q1_done, q2_projected, q2_done fields

backend_budget_comparison_biweekly.details: Returns q1_projected, q1_done, q2_projected, q2_done for each category

frontend_streak_badge.details: Flame icon with streak count displays in header when streak > 0

frontend_budget_toggle.details: Mensual/Quincenal toggle switches between monthly and biweekly views

frontend_biweekly_table.details: Table with columns: Categoria, Proy. Q1, OK, Real Q1, Proy. Q2, OK, Real Q2, Estado

frontend_category_filter.details: Dropdown shows unique categories from current month's transactions

frontend_stacked_chart_colors.details: Distinct colors: Ingresos=#22c55e (green), Gastos=#ef4444 (red), Ahorro=#3b82f6 (blue), Deudas=#f59e0b (yellow)

tests_passed: Backend: Streak endpoint returns streak, max_streak, total_days
Backend: Streak increments with transactions on consecutive days
Backend: Debt creation auto-creates expense category
Backend: Savings goal creation auto-creates expense category
Backend: Budget accepts biweekly fields (q1_projected, q1_done, q2_projected, q2_done)
Backend: Budget comparison returns biweekly fields
Backend: Budget update biweekly done checkbox works
Frontend: Streak badge with Flame icon found in header
Frontend: Biweekly table renders with Q1/Q2 columns
Frontend: Category filter dropdown found in Transactions page
Frontend: Stacked chart uses distinct colors (green, red, blue, yellow)
